name: Sulla
description: Install and manage the Sulla AI agent with Enterprise Gateway and MCP integration

commands.sulla:install: Download and install the Sulla agent for the current OS
commands.sulla:init: Setup wizard — configure Enterprise Gateway connection and MCP servers
commands.sulla:start: Start the Sulla agent in the background
commands.sulla:status: Show Sulla agent status and configuration
commands.mcp:serve: Start an MCP server over stdio — exposes all Protocol commands as tools
